events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Hook latch missing or tied back, rendering the safety latch inoperative.",
    "Rigging configuration is non-compliant with ASME B30 and OSHA 1926.251 requirements for positive locking or latch engagement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the defective hook from service.",
    "Replace with a hook that has a functioning latch or a positive locking device.",
    "Inspect all other rigging components in the staged configuration for similar defects before work begins."
  ],
  "rationale": "A missing or tied-back hook latch defeats the primary safety mechanism that prevents accidental disengagement of the load. This condition violates ASME B30.10 (hooks) and OSHA 1926.251(a)(4) which require rigging equipment to be inspected and free from defects. Work cannot proceed until the defective component is replaced.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.10 (Hooks)",
    "OSHA 1926.251(a)(4)"
  ]
}
